title: Made with Tea: Jendrik Poloczek
summary: Blockchain security engineer at Aikido; former ML researcher.
description: Currently, I'm working at Aikido Security as Blockchain Security Engineer. I started out as a PhD candidate researcher in the machine learning field, became a senior software engineer and worked in small and large scale tech companies such as Coinbase. My most recent employment was leading the infrastructure investments team as Principal Research Engineer at the European crypto investment firm Greenfield Capital.
